R0251.title: Automotive OTA Update Hijacking
R0251.definition: Attackers tamper with or replay vehicle OTA packages to implant malicious firmware or block fixes.
R0251.description: Attackers tamper with or replay vehicle OTA packages to implant malicious firmware or block fixes.
R0251.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
